_description: Phase-2 partial smoketest golden file. Hand-curated by tracing the seed_dev_data.py flow line by line. Regenerate by running the smoketest with --update-golden if behaviour intentionally changes.

penalty_case_journal._note: Penalty arithmetic: 2500 × 46/60 = 1916.67 (ROUND_HALF_EVEN); ×0.95 = 1820.83. Penalty contra = 1916.67 − 1820.83 = 95.84. The doc example in accounting_rules.md §4 shows 95.83 rounded from 0.05×prorated, but the engine balances to the cent so 95.84 is canonical.
